Description.SourceString: Lord Rasmodel rarely entrusted the rookies with any meaningful work. He found that they arrived with chaos in their hearts: they weren't old enough to realise that chaos is an ideal and rarely works in the day-to-day. So, he would give them the role of 'Warriors', and would loosely allocate them an area of the Reach to wander. "Let their cynicism grow", Rasmodel would say. "If the demons or magi don't kill them first, they might harden into one of the good ones."
